news.headline: Apple's Tim Cook meets with Trump in the Oval Office - Fox Business.
Pita Pit USA expands in Montana with new location in Belgrade; bringing community-focused dining option.
news.summary: A native of Montana and former tech leader will be introducing a community-focused fast-casual dining option in Belgrade. Pita Pit USA, a renowned Mediterranean fast-casual brand known for its customizable pita sandwiches, revealed the news on February 20, 2025. This initiative aims to bring a fresh dining experience to the area and create approximately [insert number] new jobs.

news.headline: Débrouillard named official supplier for USA Pentathlon Multisport in innovative partnership. Feb 20, 2025. #PRNewswire
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on February 20, 2025, USA Pentathlon Multisport (USAPM) announced that Débrouillard has become the Official Supplier of casual apparel for Modern Pentathlon in the United States. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for USA Pentathlon as it strives to enhance its offerings to its members and supporters.

news.headline: Global Electrical Equipment market grew at 4.33% CAGR from 2020-2023, reaching $1.54 trillion in 2023; expected to hit $2.17 trillion by 2030.
news.summary: In Dublin, the market research report titled "Electrical Equipment Market (2024 Edition): Analysis by Product Type, End User, Region, Country: Market Insights and Forecast (2020-2030)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Global Electrical Equipment market experienced a growth rate of 4.33% from 2020 to 2023, reaching a value of USD 1.54 trillion in 2023. Projections suggest that by 2030, this market is anticipated to hit USD 2.17 trillion. This comprehensive report offers insights on the global Electrical Equipment industry.

news.headline: Collective Insight releases engaging documentary on older adults in research, highlighting their importance for meaningful results.
news.summary: A Massachusetts-based woman-owned business, Collective Insight, LLC, excitedly unveils its latest documentary, Reimagining Expertise: Engaging Older Adults as Research Partners. The film highlights the essential involvement of older adults in research, emphasizing the necessity for their engagement to yield impactful outcomes. As a certified woman business enterprise, Collective Insight is dedicated to promoting equity through inclusive participation.

news.headline: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigates Verra Mobility Corp (NASDAQ: VRRM) for shareholders, probing directors' actions.
news.summary: A recent announcement on February 20, 2025 disclosed that Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP is currently conducting an investigation pertaining to Verra Mobility Corporation (NASDAQ: VRRM) in the interest of the company's shareholders. This inquiry aims to ascertain if Verra Mobility's directors may have violated their fiduciary responsibilities.

news.headline: San Diego Museum of Art's Art Alive returns April 24 - 27, 2025, with floral displays and fundraiser.
news.summary: In San Diego, the San Diego Museum of Art (SDMA) is hosting its annual Art Alive event from April 24 to April 27, 2025. This fundraiser sees floral designers creating vibrant displays inspired by artworks and architecture. Art Alive supports the museum's exhibitions, education, and community outreach programs. The event's tenth edition will kick off with the Bloom Bash party, promising a colorful celebration. This event plays a crucial role in providing year-round support to the museum.

news.headline: NACCO Industries (NYSE: NC) declares 22.75 cents/share quarterly dividend for Class A & B stock, payable on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Cleveland, NACCO Industries® (NYSE: NC) reported that the Board of Directors approved a standard cash dividend of 22.75 cents for each share. This dividend will be distributed to holders of both Class A and Class B Common Stock on March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Smartsheet marks 10 years of Smartsheet Community, a hub for innovation with passionate users. President commends users' commitment.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Smartsheet is marking the 10th anniversary of its Smartsheet Community, a community of users and experts that contribute to the company's product development. Praerit Garg, President of Product and Innovation at Smartsheet, emphasized the Community’s significance, calling it a reflection of users’ dedication and excitement for the platform. This milestone highlights the impact of the Community in driving Smartsheet’s innovation over the past decade.

news.headline: JBL debuts Flip 7 and Charge 6 at SXSW 2025, solidifying status as top speaker brand; goal set for groundbreaking week.
news.summary: JBL, a leading portable speaker brand globally, has made its presence felt at SXSW 2025 in Stamford, Connecticut. The brand, renowned as the top choice for portable speakers worldwide, has come to SXSW with a specific goal in mind.

news.headline: Proxy advisory firms ISS and another firm recommend Softchoice shareholders vote FOR proposed arrangement with WWT.
news.summary: Softchoice Corporation (TSX:SFTC) in Toronto has received positive recommendations from leading proxy advisory firms, including Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. (ISS), to vote “FOR” a special resolution for a plan of arrangement involving the Company and World Wide Technology Holding Co., LLC. The resolution is intended for Softchoice shareholders and involves a significant merger. ISS and another major advisory firm have backed this move, emphasizing its benefits and urging shareholders to support the deal.

news.headline: Element previews AVITI24™ roadmap at AGBT 2025 meeting in San Diego. Exciting developments anticipated.
news.summary: In San Diego, the company Element recently revealed its AVITI24™ Innovation Roadmap in anticipation of the Advances in Genome Biology and Technology (AGBT) 2025 Annual Meeting. This roadmap outlines the company's upcoming developments in the field.

news.headline: US to sell $76 bln 3-month bills on Feb 24th, to settle on Feb 27th.
US to sell $70 bln 5-year notes on February 25th, to settle on February 28th.
US to sell $69 bln 2-Year notes on Feb 24th, to settle on Feb 28th.
US to sell $68 bln 6-month bills on February 24th, to settle on February 27th.
US to sell $44 bln 7-year notes on February 26th, to settle on February 28th.

Fed's Bostic: Inflation data has been bumpy and that is likely to continue.
Fed's Bostic: Much could happen to yield more or fewer rate cuts.
Fed's Bostic: The Fed does not want its balance sheet to become a source of instability.
Australia approves YORVIPATH for chronic hypoparathyroidism - first-in-class treatment; Therapeutic Goods Administration authorizes.
news.summary: The Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA) has officially registered YORVIPATH® (palopegteriparatide) for treating chronic hypoparathyroidism in adults. This marks a significant milestone as the first-in-class novel PTH replacement therapy. Australia has made history by becoming the first country to secure Marketing Authorisation for YORVIPATH.

news.headline: XRP price surges on approval of world's first spot XRP ETF by Brazil's securities regulator.
news.summary: Today, the price of XRP surged following the approval of the world's first spot XRP ETF by Brazil's securities regulator. This news resulted in a significant increase in XRP's value globally.

news.headline: Fed's Bostic: The aim is still to get to the 2% target without damage to the labor market.
Fed's Bostic: The possibility of slowing quantitative tightening is not just about the debt ceiling, but also because the Fed does not want to overshoot.
Verizon EVP Joe Russo to speak at Barclays Symposium on Feb 25 at 9:15 a.m. ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Joe Russo, the executive vice president and president of Global Networks and Technology at Verizon, will be speaking at the Barclays Communications and Content Symposium on February 25 at 9:15 a.m. ET. The event will be broadcast online, and interested individuals can access the webcast through Verizon’s Investor Relations website at www.verizon.com/about/investors. Joe Russo's address is anticipated to provide insights on Verizon's strategies and developments in communication and technology.

news.headline: Orocidin A/S partners with Syngene International Limited to boost biotech innovation globally.
news.summary: In Beverly Hills, California, on February 20, 2025, Orocidin A/S, a subsidiary of Nordicus Partners Corporation (OTCQB: NORD), a financial consulting firm catering to Nordic and U.S. life sciences companies for U.S. market integration, declared a significant alliance with Syngene International Limited.

news.headline: Gogo unveils new brand after acquiring Satcom Direct, CEO confirms. Identity and logo reflect the expanded business.
news.summary: In Broomfield, Colorado on February 20, 2025, Gogo Business Aviation (NASDAQ: GOGO) acquired Satcom Direct, leading to a new brand identity under Gogo. The CEO, Chris Moore, revealed this change, highlighting the unified company's focus. The updated Gogo logo and identity blend both companies' histories while showcasing their growth in the industry.

news.headline: Egetis Therapeutics to showcase MCT8 Deficiency on Lifetime TV in honor of Rare Disease Day on Feb 28. #awareness
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Egetis Therapeutics AB will be highlighted on the TV series Behind the Mystery™, which airs on The Balancing Act® in the U.S. Egetis, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm as EGTX, focuses on developing and marketing treatments for severe diseases with high unmet medical needs in the orphan drug market. The episode, sponsored by Egetis, aims to bring attention to Rare Disease Day on February 28 and shed light on MCT8 deficiency, a rare condition. This initiative will reach a wide audience to increase awareness about rare diseases.

news.headline: Fed's Bostic: Businesses say they would try to pass along import taxes to consumers.
Fed's Bostic: I still see two Fed rate cuts this year, with a lot of uncertainty.
Fed's Bostic: The labor market is showing signs of easing, such as difficulty finding a job, but is broadly stable.
Fed's Bostic: Monetary policy is currently in a good place, but this is not a time to be complacent about risks.
ThroughPut.AI recognized in 2025 Gartner market guide for supply chain platforms, enhancing decision-making capabilities.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California on February 20, 2025, ThroughPut.AI, a leader in Industrial AI Supply Chain Analytics and Decision Intelligence, was recognized as a Representative Vendor in the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for Analytics and Decision-Making Platforms for Supply Chain. This acknowledgment solidifies ThroughPut.AI's place in the industry, showcasing their expertise and solutions in enhancing supply chain operations. This recognition comes at a crucial time as businesses are increasingly turning towards AI-powered tools to optimize their supply chain processes. ThroughPut.AI's innovative approach has been noted by industry experts, and their inclusion in this prestigious guide further highlights their impact in the field.

news.headline: Ambassador Nicholas Burns joins Washington Speakers Bureau as former U.S. Ambassador to China, having served six Presidents.
news.summary: In an announcement made on February 20, 2025, the renowned Washington Speakers Bureau (WSB) revealed that Ambassador Nicholas Burns, the former U.S. Ambassador to China, has officially become a part of its prestigious lineup. Ambassador Burns, a highly esteemed diplomat with a rich history of serving six Presidents, has joined the WSB team.

news.headline: Betty White to be honored with a new stamp by the U.S. Postal Service commemorating her warmth and charisma.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Washington, the U.S. Postal Service announced plans to honor the late actress and comedienne Betty White with a new stamp featuring her likeness. This commemoration is scheduled to take place at a first-day-of-issue event, details of which will be held at...

news.headline: SAP executives to participate in upcoming investor events. Webcast to be available on SAP IR website.
news.summary: In Walldorf, Germany on February 20, 2025, SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) disclosed that its executives will be involved in an upcoming event. The event is set to be webcasted, with a replay accessible on the SAP Investor Relations website shortly after.

news.headline: Mesirow strengthens European presence by hiring Omar Ghalloudi as Senior Managing Director, Head of European Trading.
news.summary: Mesirow is expanding its presence in Europe by naming Omar Ghalloudi as Senior Managing Director and Head of European Trading. This move highlights the company's dedication to worldwide expansion and client satisfaction. Ghalloudi, with over two decades of experience in credit trading focusing on investment-grade assets, will play a crucial role in furthering Mesirow's operations in Europe.

news.headline: Together AI secures $305M in Series B funding to expand AI acceleration cloud for open source and enterprise AI.
news.summary: Together AI has received significant funding to further establish itself as the leading AI Cloud for developing modern AI applications using open source models. The funding will also support the training of cutting-edge models through the deployment of a large number of NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. This announcement was made in San Francisco on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Nickelodeon debuts preschool series Super Duper Bunny League on YouTube on Feb. 22 and Nickelodeon on April 19. #SuperDuperBunnyLeague.
news.summary: The highly anticipated show, Super Duper Bunny League, adapted from a popular kids' comic book series by cartoonist Jamie Smart, is set to debut on Saturday, Feb. 22, on the Nick Jr. YouTube Channel, and will later air on Nickelodeon on Saturday, April 19. Fans can stay updated and share their excitement by following @Nickelodeon and @NickelodeonFamily while using the hashtag #SuperDuperBunnyLeague. For more information and promotional materials, click on the provided link to download assets.

news.headline: PranaQ® gets FDA 510(k) clearance for TipTraQ, an AI home sleep apnea test, supported by NAVER D2SF in Seoul.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on February 20, 2025, PranaQ, supported by NAVER D2SF, is making strides in AI-driven healthcare solutions. NAVER D2SF, the corporate venture arm of NAVER, is dedicated to partnering with startups to foster innovation and lasting development. This recent investment...

news.headline: FBCL to adjust toll rates and transition to cashless tolling at Blue Water Bridge on April 1, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Point Edward, Ontario, the Federal Bridge Corporation Limited (FBCL) unveiled plans for the Blue Water Bridge (BWB). Starting from April 1, 2025, there will be alterations in toll rates and a switch to entirely cashless tolling. This shift signifies a significant move ahead for BWB, with the aim of improving operational efficiency and enhancing user experience.

news.headline: Nickelodeon orders 26 episodes of new series "Avatar: Seven Havens," set in Avatar: The Last Airbender world for 20th anniversary.
news.summary: Nickelodeon is commemorating the 20th anniversary of Avatar: The Last Airbender by launching the Avatar Studios Banner with a 26-episode pickup. The network is celebrating with new digital content, location-based experiences, and partnerships in consumer products, publishing, and games.

news.headline: Ayala Land partners with Island Pacific in the U.S. to serve Filipino communities; a strategic move for growth.
news.summary: In City of Industry, California, on February 20, 2025, Ayala Land International Sales, Inc. (ALISI), the global marketing arm of Ayala Land, announced a partnership with Island Pacific, a prominent Filipino supermarket chain in the United States. This collaboration aims to enhance ALISI's presence and expand its reach in the market. The partnership is set to leverage Island Pacific's extensive network of stores across the US, totaling over 50 locations, to promote and sell Ayala Land's real estate offerings. This strategic alliance is anticipated to significantly boost ALISI's sales and visibility in the US market, benefiting from Island Pacific's strong foothold in the Filipino-American community.

news.headline: QuicksortRx named #1 for Purchasing Optimization Analytics in Best in KLAS 2025 report, boosting health systems' efficiency.
news.summary: In Charleston, South Carolina on February 20, 2025, QuicksortRx, a tech company aiding health systems in minimizing medication expenses and boosting pharmacy operations, has secured the top position for Purchasing Optimization Analytics in the Best in KLAS 2025 evaluation. This recognition signifies QuicksortRx's leadership in the industry, showcasing its effectiveness in improving pharmacy cost management.

news.headline: Avathon chosen by Air Force for AI supply chain tools. Partnering with tech firms for USAF digital shift.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California, on February 20, 2025, Avathon, a prominent AI platform provider for industrial operations, announced its collaboration with several tech firms to spearhead the digital overhaul of the United States Air Force (USAF). The initiative aims to minimize operational risks by implementing cutting-edge technology solutions.

news.headline: Desiccant Dehumidifier Market projected to reach USD 811 Billion by 2031 due to increasing demand in air quality and industrial applications.
news.summary: Market Research Intellect has unveiled its newest market intelligence report titled "Desiccant Dehumidifier Market: Global Industry Trends, Market Share, Growth, and Forecast." This comprehensive report offers vital information on market trends for industry stakeholders. It covers in-depth analysis and forecasts for the desiccant dehumidifier market globally. The report is aimed at assisting stakeholders in making informed decisions based on industry data.

news.headline: Artimus Robotics wins £1.5M UK ARIA Award for robotic hardware development. Exciting progress ahead!
news.summary: Artimus Robotics, based in Boulder, Colorado, has recently secured £1.5 million in funding from the UK government's Advanced Research + Invention Agency (ARIA) on February 20, 2025. This financial backing will be pivotal in driving crucial advancements in Artimus' artificial muscle technology. For more information, visit www.artimusrobotics.com.

news.headline: New educational activities with Fontina cheese PDO launched in 4 Southwest cities in Feb 2025. European initiative.
news.summary: In February 2025, a masterclass began featuring Fontina cheese across four prominent cities in the Southwest region. The campaign, "Landmarks from Europe: Good products made with respect," was launched in New York and Vancouver, BC.
